title: aster trinervius subsp. ageratoides
intro: Aster trinervius subsp. ageratoides, also known as White Sagebrush, is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of White Sagebrush include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and ease respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Aster trinervius subsp. ageratoides include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of illness.
